note: This is an educational/instructional video demonstrating vaginal cuff closure technique with labeled anatomy, port configurations, and step-by-step suturing sequence. It is NOT an official FLS/MISTELS task and therefore is not scored per FLS rubric.
content_type: Educational demonstration with objectives slide, equipment overview, anatomical model setup, port configuration diagrams, and procedural technique narration
video_contains: Objectives slide for vaginal cuff closure training
Equipment and instrumentation (needle drivers, clamps, suture material)
Anatomical model setup showing vagina, vaginal epithelium, and vaginal epithelium support layers
Port configuration diagram (camera port at umbilicus, left and right hand ports identified)
- Initial loop placement and knot formation
- Multi-throw suturing pattern (appears to be continuous running closure with multiple passes)
- Bilateral suture placement along vaginal cuff edges
- Final cuff closure with multiple interrupted sutures
- Completion of vaginal cuff with sealed closure

demonstrated_techniques: Proper needle driver grip and needle loading at 2/3 point
Entry and exit point precision for vaginal epithelial bites
Loop formation and knot tying technique with two needle drivers
Continuous running suture pattern for vaginal cuff closure
Bilateral suture placement for hemostasis and tissue approximation
Final closure verification with complete epithelial seal
Instrument coordination between left and right hand ports
verbal_cues: Objectives emphasize review of items needed, key steps for adequate closure, and port configuration demonstrations
common_errors_addressed: Video implicitly demonstrates proper spacing and depth of bites to avoid vaginal epithelial perforation
Shows importance of bilateral suture placement for complete cuff closure
Emphasizes secure knot formation to prevent suture slippage

scoring_note: This video does not represent an official FLS task performance and therefore cannot be scored using FLS rubric formulas. It is educational content designed to teach vaginal cuff closure technique. No completion time, penalties, or FLS score are applicable.
confidence_rationale: Video classification as instructional is certain based on presence of objectives slide, labeled anatomy, equipment overview, and sequential technique demonstration without performance timing or scoring context.
